title: Opening for Software Engineer at Medlife

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Medlife
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
